description: Canonical replayable workload corpus and reproducibility bundle for runtime ascension baseline tracks.

runtime_profiles.description: Release-mode benchmark runners with criterion output and perf gate artifacts.
Host integration suites that exercise runtime, protocol, and cancellation surfaces.
Pure deterministic lab or oracle-driven replay anchors.
Deterministic distributed harness and fault-script preview runs.

expansion_packs.description: Optional HTTP application-layer workload that extends the core I/O surface without changing the baseline denominator.
Optional real multi-agent coordination pressure pack synthesized from redacted Agent Mail, Beads, bv, rch, git-frontier, and proof-artifact workload bundles without changing the baseline denominator.

workloads.entry_command: WORKLOAD_ID=AA01-WL-CPU-001 RUNTIME_PROFILE=bench-release WORKLOAD_CONFIG_REF='scripts/run_perf_e2e.sh::phase0_baseline,scheduler_benchmark' ASUPERSYNC_SEED=0xAA010201 RCH_BIN=rch bash ./scripts/run_perf_e2e.sh --bench phase0_baseline --bench scheduler_benchmark --no-compare

WORKLOAD_ID=AA01-WL-CANCEL-001 RUNTIME_PROFILE=lab-deterministic WORKLOAD_CONFIG_REF='tests/cancellation_stress_e2e.rs::cancel_storm_single_region' TEST_SEED=0xAA010202 ASUPERSYNC_SEED=0xAA010202 RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_runtime_workload_corpus_cancel cargo test --test cancellation_stress_e2e cancel_storm_single_region -- --nocapture

WORKLOAD_ID=AA01-WL-BURST-001 RUNTIME_PROFILE=native-e2e WORKLOAD_CONFIG_REF='scripts/test_scheduler_wakeup_e2e.sh::scheduler_backoff+scheduler_lane_fairness+stress_tests' TEST_SEED=0xAA010204 SKIP_LOOM=1 RCH_BIN=rch bash ./scripts/test_scheduler_wakeup_e2e.sh

WORKLOAD_ID=AA01-WL-TIMER-001 RUNTIME_PROFILE=lab-deterministic WORKLOAD_CONFIG_REF='tests/time_e2e.rs::test_timer_wheel_basic_operations' TEST_SEED=0xAA010205 ASUPERSYNC_SEED=0xAA010205 RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_runtime_workload_corpus_timer cargo test --test time_e2e test_timer_wheel_basic_operations -- --nocapture
